explanations.1: This decorator (@function) modifies the behavior of the function below it, similar to how a wrapper changes how something works.
explanations.2: The 'async' keyword means this function can pause and resume, allowing other code to run while it waits for tasks to complete.
explanations.4: This creates a task group that will run all the scheduled tasks at the same time instead of one after another, making everything faster.
explanations.5: start_soon() schedules a task to run without waiting for it to finish, similar to starting multiple workers instead of doing jobs one at a time.
